title: Extended Methods & Materials
text: Welcome to the extended methods document for our poster presentation. Because scientific posters are best designed to focus on visual results and overarching conclusions, we have offloaded the dense methodological details, pipeline parameters, and full cohort statistics to this webpage.

title: Extended Methods & Materials
text:
2.1 1.1 Inclusion & Exclusion Criteria

List inclusion criteria here.
List exclusion criteria here.

title: Extended Methods & Materials
text:
3.1 2.1 Freesurfer Pipeline
We utilized FreeSurfer v7.3.2 to extract cortical thickness and subcortical volumes. Specifically, the following flags were applied: recon-all -all -s {subject_id} -qcache -measure thickness -fwhm 15

title: Extended Methods & Materials
text:
3.2 2.2 Quality Control (QC)
All scans were visually inspected using the ENIGMA QC protocols. Scans with excessive motion artifacts or failed surface segmentations were excluded.

title: Extended Methods & Materials
text:
4.1 3.1 Vertex-wise GLMs
Vertex-wise general linear models (GLMs) were conducted using BrainStat. The primary model tested for main effects of diagnosis and interactions with aggression. * Equation: Thickness ~ Diagnosis * Aggression + Age + Sex + Site * Thresholding: Random Field Theory (RFT) cluster-level correction (p < 0.05).

title: Extended Methods & Materials
text:
4.2 3.2 Subcortical Volumes
Volumetric analysis was performed using standard linear regression, correcting for Intracranial Volume (ICV).
